pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + SLOT + Brotli — 1.1088 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA+CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels, expands the MLP to 3.5×, and uses Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quant plus Brotli to keep quality within 16MB.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with precomputed activation gradients
Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 GPTQ to free headroom for the 3.5× MLP expansion
Brotli-11 compression and LR-floor warmdown to stay under 16MB while enabling SLOT eval
